name: CMP_TCS_STMT_RATING_VL
query: SELECT RATING.STMT_RATING_ID , RATING.STMT_ID , RATING.STMT_PERD_ID , RATING.PERD_RUN_ID , RATING.RATING_CODE , RATING_TL.RATING , RATING.ORDER_NUM , RATING_TL.DESCRIPTION , RATING_TL.LANGUAGE , RATING.REQUEST_ID , RATING.JOB_DEFINITION_NAME , RATING.JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE , RATING.CREATED_BY , RATING.CREATION_DATE , RATING.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , RATING.LAST_UPDATED_BY , RATING.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_TCS_STMT_RATING_B RATING, CMP_TCS_STMT_RATING_TL RATING_TL WHERE RATING.STMT_RATING_ID = RATING_TL.STMT_RATING_ID AND RATING_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
